challenges.title: Clip-Path Shapes
challenges.description: Write CSS with two rules: (1) target '.circle' and use clip-path with circle(50%) to clip it into a circle, (2) target '.triangle' and use clip-path with polygon() to create a triangle shape using three coordinate points. Assign your CSS to the variable `css`.
challenges.test_code:
assert 'clip-path' in css.lower(), 'Should use clip-path property'
assert '.circle' in css.lower(), 'Should target .circle'
assert '.triangle' in css.lower(), 'Should target .triangle'
assert 'circle(' in css.lower(), 'Should use circle() function'
assert '50%' in css, 'Should use 50% for circle radius'
assert 'polygon(' in css.lower(), 'Should use polygon() function for triangle'
hints: clip-path: circle(50%) creates a perfect circle clipping mask.
A triangle polygon needs three points, e.g., polygon(50% 0%, 0% 100%, 100% 100%).

challenges.title: Clip-Path with Hover Transition
challenges.description: Write CSS that targets '.shape' and sets clip-path to circle(30%) with a transition of clip-path 0.5s ease. Then write a '.shape:hover' rule that changes clip-path to circle(50%). Also set the '.shape' width and height to 200px and background-color to a color of your choice. Assign your CSS to the variable `css`.
challenges.test_code:
assert '.shape' in css.lower(), 'Should target .shape'
assert 'clip-path' in css.lower(), 'Should use clip-path'
assert 'circle(' in css.lower(), 'Should use circle() function'
assert '30%' in css, 'Should start with circle(30%)'
assert '50%' in css, 'Should expand to circle(50%) on hover'
assert 'transition' in css.lower(), 'Should use transition property'
assert 'hover' in css.lower(), 'Should have a :hover rule'
assert '0.5s' in css.lower() or '.5s' in css.lower(), 'Should use 0.5s transition duration'
assert 'background' in css.lower(), 'Should set a background color'
assert '200px' in css, 'Should set width and height to 200px'
hints: clip-path can be animated with CSS transitions when the shape function type matches.
Define the default clip-path on .shape and the expanded one on .shape:hover.
Include transition: clip-path 0.5s ease to animate smoothly between states.
